authors_text: Quan Vuong,Yuzhe Qin,Runlin Guo,Xiaolong Wang,Hao Su,Henrik Christensen
title: Single RGB-D Camera Teleoperation for General Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 用于通用机器人操作的单 RGB-D 相机远程操作
abstract: We propose a teleoperation system that uses a single RGB-D camera as the human motion capture device. Our system can perform general manipulation tasks such as cloth folding, hammering and 3mm clearance peg in hole. We propose the use of non-Cartesian oblique coordinate frame, dynamic motion scaling and reposition of operator frames to increase the flexibility of our teleoperation system. We hypothesize that lowering the barrier of entry to teleoperation will allow for wider deployment of supervised autonomy system, which will in turn generates realistic datasets that unlock the potential of machine learning for robotic manipulation. Demo of our systems are available online https://sites.google.com/view/manipulation-teleop-with-rgbd
summary: We propose a teleoperation system that uses a single RGB-D camera as the human motion capture device. Our system can perform general manipulation tasks such as cloth folding, hammering and 3mm clearance peg in hole. We propose the use of non-Cartesian oblique coordinate frame, dynamic motion scaling and reposition of operator frames to increase the flexibility of our teleoperation system. We hypothesize that lowering the barrier of entry to teleoperation will allow for wider deployment of supervised autonomy system, which will in turn generates realistic datasets that unlock the potential of machine learning for robotic manipulation. Demo of our systems are available online https://sites.google.com/view/manipulation-teleop-with-rgbd
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种远程操作系统，该系统使用单个 RGB-D 相机作为人体动作捕捉设备。我们的系统可以执行一般操作任务，例如布料折叠、锤击和 3 毫米间隙钉入孔。我们建议使用非笛卡尔倾斜坐标系、动态运动缩放和操作员坐标系的重新定位来提高远程操作系统的灵活性。我们假设，降低远程操作的准入门槛将允许更广泛地部署监督自主系统，这反过来又会生成现实的数据集，从而释放机器学习在机器人操作方面的潜力。我们的系统演示可在线获取 https://sites.google.com/view/manipulation-teleop-with-rgbd

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目RGB-D相机的远程操作系统，用于实现通用机器人操作任务，如折叠衣物、锤击和精密插孔操作。
AI.motivation: 通过降低远程操作的技术门槛，推动监督自主系统的广泛应用，从而生成高质量真实数据集以提升机器人操作的机器学习效果。
AI.method: 采用非笛卡尔斜坐标系、动态运动缩放及操作者框架重定位技术，增强系统灵活性与操作精度。
AI.result: 系统成功完成多种复杂操作任务，开源演示验证了方法的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为普及机器人监督自主系统提供了新路径，并为机器学习在机器人操作领域的应用奠定了数据基础。
